--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Please advise:

  1. Should Peg close the office on Veteran's Day?

  2. If Peg should not close the office, can Peg

take the day off as a
vacation day?

Thanks.

Darren

Date: Wed, 09 Nov 2005 15:36:14 -0500
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: Veterans Day

Darren,
This Friday is Veterans Day and some years we have
closed the
office. Please check with Jeffrey to see if we
should stay
open. Regardless, I would like to take Friday off
as a vacation
day. Please make sure this is OK with Jeffrey.
Thanks.
Peg
